# relatedFileNamesInSameDirectory

**Instance Property**

An array of related file names in the parent directory of the byte source file.

## Declaration

```swift
var relatedFileNamesInSameDirectory: [String] { get }
```

## Discussion

The array of related files within the [doc://com.apple.mediaextension/documentation/MediaExtension/MEByteSource]’s parent directory that are accessible to the [doc://com.apple.mediaextension/documentation/MediaExtension/MEByteSource]. Only the relative file names are returned, not the paths. Only files with file extensions listed in the [doc://com.apple.mediaextension/documentation/MediaExtension/kMEFormatReaderFileNameExtensionArrayKey] array in the format reader property list will be returned. If no related files are available, returns an empty array.

## Inspecting a byte source

- **fileName**: The name of the file for the byte source.
- **fileLength**: The length of the byte source file.
- **contentType**: The format of the byte source file.
